2026-03-10.title: West Bengal SIR test: reading the Supreme Court’s order
2026-03-10.title_hi: पश्चिम बंगाल में चुनावी मतदाता सूची विवाद: सुप्रीम कोर्ट के आदेश की व्याख्या
2026-03-10.gs_paper: GS2 — Polity: Election Commission and Electoral Reforms
2026-03-10.context: The Supreme Court's order comes amidst 60 lakh pending cases in West Bengal. The Election Commission's handling of electoral rolls has been under scrutiny. The publication of final rolls is a critical step in the electoral process. The Supreme Court's intervention aims to expedite the adjudication of disputes. The Election Commission's current staffing has been questioned, with some arguing for permanent staff to handle such disputes.
key_points: The Supreme Court — Order: Deployment of judicial officers to decide electoral roll disputes in West Bengal.
Election Commission — Electoral Roll Disputes: 60 lakh cases pending adjudication.
The Supreme Court — Order: Aims to expedite the adjudication of electoral roll disputes.
Election Commission — Staffing: Debate on whether the Election Commission should be equipped with permanent staff.
The Supreme Court — Order: Publication of final rolls to be facilitated by the deployment of judicial officers.

2026-03-10.title: Prime Minister to launch projects worth ₹10,800 crore at Kochi event
2026-03-10.title_hi: प्रधानमंत्री ₹10,800 करोड़ की परियोजनाओं का शुभारंभ करेंगे
2026-03-10.gs_paper: GS2 — Governance: Government Schemes and Initiatives
2026-03-10.context: The Prime Minister will lay the foundation stone for a polypropylene unit at Kochi Refinery, which is part of the projects worth ₹10,800 crore. The event in Kochi will also see the inauguration of 23 rural roads constructed under the Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana in the State. The Kochi Refinery is a key project for the region, and the polypropylene unit is expected to boost the local economy. The Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana has been instrumental in connecting rural areas with better road infrastructure. The total investment of ₹10,800 crore is a significant boost to the region's development.
key_points: The Prime Minister — Kochi Refinery: Laying foundation stone for a polypropylene unit.
The Prime Minister — Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana: Inaugurating 23 rural roads constructed under the scheme.
The Government — Kochi Event: Launching projects worth ₹10,800 crore.
The Kochi Refinery — Polypropylene Unit: Expected to boost the local economy.
The Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana — Rural Roads: Connecting rural areas with better road infrastructure.

2026-03-10.title: Supreme Court approves Centre's proposal extending term of tribunal members
2026-03-10.title_hi: उच्चतम न्यायालय ने केंद्र के प्रस्ताव को मंजूरी दी, ट्रिब्यूनल सदस्यों का कार्यकाल बढ़ाया
2026-03-10.gs_paper: GS2 — Polity: Judiciary and Tribunal Reforms
2026-03-10.context: The Supreme Court has approved the Centre's proposal to extend the term of tribunal members appointed under the Tribunal Reforms Act of 2021. This decision will affect around 21 members who are due to retire by next September. The Attorney General, R Venkataramani, stated that a new law is likely to be enacted by the next Budget session or the Monsoon session. The Tribunal Reforms Act of 2021 will continue to be in effect until then. The extension of the term of tribunal members will provide continuity and stability to the tribunals.
key_points: Supreme Court — Tribunal Reforms Act of 2021: Approved the Centre's proposal to extend the term of tribunal members.
Attorney General — R Venkataramani: Stated that a new law is likely to be enacted by the next Budget session or the Monsoon session.
Tribunal Reforms Act of 2021: Will continue to be in effect until the new law is enacted.
Centre — Proposal: Extended the term of around 21 tribunal members who are due to retire by next September.
Supreme Court — Decision: Provided continuity and stability to the tribunals.

2026-03-10.title: Israel-Iran war: Trump says war will end 'very soon'; U.S. saving some ‘most important’ targets for later
2026-03-10.title_hi: इज़राइल-ईरान संघर्ष: ट्रंप ने कहा जल्द ही युद्ध समाप्त हो जाएगा
2026-03-10.gs_paper: GS2 — International Relations: Middle East Conflict
2026-03-10.context: The conflict between Israel and Iran has escalated, with the US involved. The US President has stated that the war will end 'very soon' and that some targets are being saved for later. The US Congress has not approved the conflict. The President referred to the situation as an 'excursion' rather than a war, attempting to minimize its significance.
key_points: US President — Statement: Downplayed the scale of the conflict, referring to it as an 'excursion'.
US President — Statement: Claimed the war will end 'very soon'.
US Congress — Approval: Has not approved the conflict.
US President — Strategy: Saving some targets for later.
US President — Terminology: Repeatedly called the conflict an 'excursion' rather than a war.

2026-03-10.title: UP govt signs pact with Hinduja Group firm to expand broadband connectivity
2026-03-10.title_hi: उत्तर प्रदेश सरकार ने हिंदुजा समूह की कंपनी के साथ ब्रॉडबैंड कनेक्टिविटी विस्तार के लिए समझौता किया
2026-03-10.gs_paper: GS2 — Governance: Government Schemes and Initiatives
2026-03-10.context: The Uttar Pradesh government has signed a pact with a Hinduja Group firm to expand broadband connectivity in the state. The pact aims to provide high-speed internet services to over 3,000 villages and 200 towns. The project is expected to be completed within the next 2 years at a cost of ₹2,500 crore. The Hinduja Group firm will be responsible for laying down the necessary infrastructure, including fiber optic cables and mobile towers. This initiative is part of the state government's efforts to improve digital connectivity and promote economic growth.
key_points: Uttar Pradesh government — Broadband Expansion Project: Aims to provide high-speed internet services to over 3,000 villages and 200 towns.
Hinduja Group firm — Infrastructure Development: Will lay down fiber optic cables and mobile towers at a cost of ₹2,500 crore.
Uttar Pradesh government — Digital Connectivity Initiative: Launched in 2020, aims to provide broadband connectivity to all villages by 2025.
Uttar Pradesh government — Economic Growth Promotion: Expects the project to promote economic growth and improve digital connectivity.
Hinduja Group firm — Project Completion: Expected to complete the project within the next 2 years.
